description: This file defines the Bootstrap Carousel component, including its class implementation, constants, event handling, and integration with jQuery. It manages carousel behavior such as sliding, cycling, and user interactions.

classes.name: Carousel
classes.description: A class extending BaseComponent that implements the Bootstrap carousel functionality, including slide transitions, cycling, event handling, and configuration options.

methods.name: next
methods.description: Advances the carousel to the next item.

methods.name: nextWhenVisible
methods.description: Advances to the next item only if the document and carousel are visible.

methods.name: prev
methods.description: Moves the carousel to the previous item.

methods.name: pause
methods.description: Pauses the automatic cycling of the carousel.

methods.name: cycle
methods.description: Starts automatic cycling of the carousel based on the configured interval.

methods.name: to
methods.description: Slides to a specific item index.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up event listeners and resources used by the carousel instance.
